basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate-I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT Surat) Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website svnit.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation as per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E./M.Tech./M.Sc. with First class in Chemical/Environment/Biotechnology Engg./Environmental/Biochemical Science Equivalent with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA, CSIR-UGC NET or GATE qualified (for JRF), M.E./M.Tech. with First class in above streams with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA without NET/GATE (for Project Associate-I)
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I: M.E./M.Tech./M.Sc. with First class in Chemical/Environment/Biotechnology Engg./Environmental/Biochemical Science Equivalent with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from a recognized university/institute. Candidates must have qualified CSIR-UGC NET or GATE Examination to apply under JRF. OR Project Associate-I: M.E./M.Tech. with First class in above streams with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from a recognized university/institute without NET/GATE.

salary_details.details: JRF: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA (first two years), Rs. 42,000 per month + HRA (third year) Project Associate-I: Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA (first two years), Rs. 33,000 per month + HRA (third year)

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Vacancy Details 2026
SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I: M.E./M.Tech./M.Sc. with First class in Chemical/Environment/Biotechnology Engg./Environmental/Biochemical Science Equivalent with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from a recognized university/institute. Candidates must have qualified CSIR-UGC NET or GATE Examination to apply under JRF. OR Project Associate-I: M.E./M.Tech. with First class in above streams with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from a recognized university/institute without NET/GATE.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation as per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Salary 2026
content_sections.text: JRF: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA (first two years), Rs. 42,000 per month + HRA (third year) Project Associate-I: Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA (first two years), Rs. 33,000 per month + HRA (third year)

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Surat Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I posts at SVNIT Surat is scheduled for 20th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M.Tech./M.Sc. with First class in Chemical/Environment/Biotechnology Engg./Environmental/Biochemical Science Equivalent with minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA. For JRF, CSIR-UGC NET or GATE qualification is mandatory. For Project Associate-I, this qualification is not required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I positions is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for JRF is Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA for the first two years and Rs. 42,000 per month + HRA for the third year. For Project Associate-I, the salary is Rs. 30,000 per month + HRA for the first two years and Rs. 33,000 per month + HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I posts?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate-I position at SVNIT Surat.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the location for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT Surat), Gujarat.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.
